race.description: Sky Racing Qtis 3YO Fillies Mdn Plate
race.comment: OUR HUNTRESS (11) is knocking on the door of a maiden victory with six consecutive placings to start her career and may have found the right race here. Kept up to the mark for this with a recent trial placing and should be right there when the whips are cracking. AGADOO (7) has placed two of four over this distance range and will be better with that first-up effort now in the locker. Include in calculations. ARCTIC BRIGHT (8) was a touch disappointing last time out but the form prior was good enough for a race of this calibre. Worth another chance. TOOBLOOS (13) is drawn to get a gun run in transit from the inside marble and looks one for the exotics players. ST ANDREWS (6) gets in well at the weights with the claim and may earn some minor money.
